title: Spanish Sweet Potato Skillet
description: A simple and flavorful dish perfect for a weeknight dinner. Sweet potatoes and crispy potatoes are cooked in a skillet with Spanish spices.
instructions: Peel and slice the sweet potatoes and regular potatoes into 1/2-inch thick rounds.
In a large skillet, heat the olive oil over medium heat.
Add the sliced potatoes to the skillet and cook for 5-7 minutes, or until they start to brown.
Sprinkle the Spanish paprika, salt, and pepper over the potatoes and toss to coat.
Transfer the skillet to the preheated oven and bake for 15-20 minutes, or until the potatoes are tender and golden brown.
Remove the skillet from the oven and sprinkle with garlic powder.
Serve the Spanish sweet potato skillet hot, garnished with chopped fresh herbs if desired.
